summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a solid early‑90s show with a smoking “Queen Jane” and tight Stones‑era jams.
review: The matrix mix is praised as excellent, delivering clear sound that brings the memories of this early‑90s performance back to life. Musically the concert is described as a strong start with Garcia opening on “Cold Rain & Snow,” a standout “Queen Jane” that “smoked,” and Hornsby laying down a solid groove on the Stones‑style numbers, despite some lyrical flubs typical of the era.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is rated as good/solid with notable highlights; recording quality is excellent, leading to an overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix mix is clear and well‑balanced; reviewers note no technical problems and praise the fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Nice set list with a strong opening, solid first‑set energy and enjoyable Stones‑era jams; overall well‑played despite occasional flubbed lyrics.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Opened the show with “Cold Rain & Snow,” setting an energetic tone.
band_member_comments.Keys: Hornsby kept a tight groove on the Stones‑style tunes, adding strong keyboard work.
